default_value: repo root derived from script location
description: Repo root to inventory and validate.
effect_summary: Selects the tracked-file inventory and current-surface coverage scope.

description: Directory containing editable JSONL contract files.
effect_summary: Redirects contract input selection.

description: Schema file to apply before inserting contract rows.
effect_summary: Redirects schema input selection.

description: Optional JSONL path for append-only planned-run records.
effect_summary: Adds an audit output for selected and skipped scheduler decisions without executing workspace work.

description: Identifier for one selector planning pass.
effect_summary: Stamps all planned-run records from the same selection pass with a shared planner identifier.

description: Optional timestamp override for planned-run records.
effect_summary: Allows deterministic replay or tests while preserving explicit planning time metadata.

description: Maximum runner attempts recorded in each planned-run budget.
effect_summary: Overrides the effective attempt budget for each workspace and can cause retry-suppressed workspaces to be skipped.

description: Optional maximum wall-clock runtime seconds recorded in each planned-run budget.
effect_summary: Overrides the effective runtime budget recorded for each workspace while the selector remains read-only.

description: Path to one validated local source-adapter manifest.
effect_summary: Chooses the local file or directory adapter manifest that will be planned in read-only mode.

description: Output format for the local source-adapter plan.
effect_summary: Switches the planning report between machine-readable JSON and concise text output.

description: Optional JSONL path for emitted handoff records.
effect_summary: Writes normalized handoff records to an operator-selected file in addition to stdout planning output.

description: Path to one validated local structured-data source-adapter manifest.
effect_summary: Chooses the local file or directory structured-data adapter manifest that will be planned in read-only mode.

description: Output format for the structured-data adapter plan.
effect_summary: Switches the planning report between machine-readable JSON and concise text output.

description: Optional JSONL path for emitted per-record structured-data handoff records.
effect_summary: Writes normalized handoff records to an operator-selected file in addition to stdout planning output.

description: Path to one validated remote_url_manifest source-adapter manifest.
effect_summary: Chooses the remote URL-manifest adapter manifest that will be planned in read-only mode.

description: Path to a local JSONL snapshot of explicit URL observations.
effect_summary: Supplies the explicit URL manifest rows that will be validated and planned without network access.

description: Output format for the remote URL-manifest plan.
effect_summary: Switches the planning report between machine-readable JSON and concise text output.

description: Optional JSONL path for emitted configured-remote handoff records.
effect_summary: Writes normalized handoff records to an operator-selected file in addition to stdout planning output.

description: Path to one validated local_git_repo source-adapter manifest.
effect_summary: Chooses the local Git repository adapter manifest that will be planned in read-only mode.

description: Output format for the local Git repository plan.
effect_summary: Switches the planning report between machine-readable JSON and concise text output.

description: Optional JSONL path for emitted per-snapshot Git handoff records.
effect_summary: Writes normalized Git handoff records to an operator-selected file in addition to stdout planning output.

description: Optional output file path for the serialized export.
effect_summary: Redirects serializer output from stdout to a file.

description: Optional maximum number of works to export.
effect_summary: Narrows export output for smoke tests or small handoff slices.

description: Emit a machine-readable loss report for the selected format instead of serialized records.
effect_summary: Reports exported, transformed, dropped, review-required, and skipped fields/records for the selected format.

description: Emit a human-readable per-record explanation of fields the selected format will drop.
effect_summary: Changes output from serialized records to manifest-driven loss explanation text.

description: Optional work_key_v1/work_id filter used with --explain-loss.
effect_summary: Narrows per-record loss explanation output to one record.

description: Optional work_key_v1/work_id selector for exporting one durable work bundle.
effect_summary: Narrows serializer output to one canonical work record and its loaded durable bundle.
